specific_question: In Q3, 2024, how did Elexion’s production delays impact its delivery commitments for mid-range EV models?
answer: Elexion’s internal manufacturing dashboard reported that 17% of Q3 2024 mid-range EV orders were delayed by at least two weeks due to supply chain bottlenecks in battery components.
dr_question: Based on the 2024 report "Trends in electric cars" on iea.org, how are competitor strategies and market positioning shaping the North American EV sector by Q2 2026?
